# PIITool All Usecases Fixture

This fixture is intentionally synthetic. Values are fake but shaped like real data.
Use it for manual CLI/gateway checks and automated regression tests.

## Core PII

Person: Alice Martin met Bob Martin and Carla Stone.
Company: Alice works at Acme Labs and Bob consults for Globex Records.
Email: alice.martin@acmelabs.com and support@globexrecords.eu.
Phone: +1 (415) 555-0100 and +33 1 44 55 66 77.
Domain: private-tenant.internaltools.dev.
URL: https://portal.acmelabs.com/customers/alice-martin?ticket=12345
Handle: @alice_private
Identifier: TAX id: FR-ABCD-123456789
Identifier: VAT # EU-998877665
Identifier: SSN 123-45-6789
Identifier: SIREN 552100554

## Secrets And Environment Variables

OpenAI key: OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz123456
GitHub token: GITHUB_TOKEN=ghp_abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz123456
AWS access key: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=AKIA1234567890ABCDEF
Slack token: SLACK_BOT_TOKEN=xoxb-123456789012-123456789012-abcdefghijklmnop
Existing PIITool secret alias: PIITOOL_SECRET_123456789012

## SecurityAgent Destinations

Allowed target example: secrets.set should receive PIITOOL_SECRET_123456789012 only after approval.
Blocked target example: blog.publish must not publish PIITOOL_SECRET_123456789012.
Blocked target example: email.send must not send OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz123456.

## Review Gateway Candidates

Possible duplicate person: Alicia Martin may need merge review with Alice Martin.
Possible duplicate company: Acme Laboratory may need merge review with Acme Labs.

## LLM/Media-Oriented Cases

Address-style text: 221B Baker Street, London NW1 6XE.
Asset-style text: internal invoice INV-2026-00042 and customer file customer-alice-martin.pdf.
